error_messages: Mechanical attribution flagged 'Elevated AI' as missing, but source bullet 'Elevated the user experience of the AI platform by crafting hundreds of prompts...' contains the claim; no factual fabrication found.
Personal pronoun 'her' appears in the WrittenResume summary, violating the absolute ban on personal pronouns.

The bullet claims '$150MM' revenue boost, but the source bullet states '$150MM' (same value, different abbreviation); mechanical check missed due to abbreviation difference, but the claim is present in source.

The bullet claims 'by applying the JTBD framework to product-market fit, go-to-market strategy, and a multi-year roadmap based on job-specific customer segments' but the source bullet only mentions using JTBD to determine product-market fit, go-to-market strategies, and a multi-year roadmap; the paraphrase is acceptable and the claim is sourced, so no fabrication.
The summary contains the personal pronoun 'she' (inferred from 'she/her' in source pronoun field), which is forbidden in the WrittenResume.
Fabricated claim: '$1.3 million' and '6,300 tons' not found in source bullets or scope; source says 'nearly $1.3million' and '6300 tons' (no comma).
Fabricated claim: '$100 million' not found in source bullets or scope; source says '$100million' (no space).
Personal pronoun 'who' (referring to candidate) appears in summary.
Fabricated custom section 'Patents & Innovations' not present in source resume.
